developer_reply:
Hi Pezster! You can access the ATM map in the Chime app by following these:

1. Tap Move at the bottom of your screen.
2. Select Cash Map from the options in the Move Money menu.
3. Toggle between Withdraw and Deposit at the top to find nearby ATMs or deposit locations.

Also, the Withdraw tab displays both fee-free ATMs and cash-back locations.
